gameplay.note: Compact extraction loop with immediate core collection, interference risk, timer pressure, and deterministic win/loss hooks.

controls.note: WASD/arrow movement plus pointer drag and F pulse-scan are easy to learn and straightforward to automate.

visualClarity.note: High-contrast cyan cores, red hazards, bright drone silhouette, and large HUD readouts support screenshot QA.

performance.note: Canvas-only 2D rendering with bounded entity counts should remain lightweight in Playwright and preview captures.

replayability.note: Timer survival, increasing difficulty, missed-core signal drain, and pulse-scan timing create a clear arcade improvement loop.

agentSelfTestQuality.note: Smoke tests can deterministically start, move, collect, collide, win, verify manifest metadata, and capture artifacts.
